channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: APC Senators List 2027: Who Don Enter So Far From Each State
item.description: As we dey approach the 2027 general elections, APC don wrap up some of dia primary elections wey go decide wetin candidates go represent the party for Senate. Naija News report say plenty serving gove...

item.title: Sherilyn Fenn’s Iconic Role as Audrey Horne in Twin Peaks and Her Impact on 1990s Television
item.description: Sherilyn Fenn’s portrayal of Audrey Horne in the original Twin Peaks (1990–1991) remains one of the most memorable performances in television history. Audrey, the neglected daughter of local tycoon Be...

item.title: Pirates and Sundowns look to end long title droughts in PSL and CAF competitions
item.description: This weekend marks a pivotal moment for two of South Africa's biggest football clubs, Orlando Pirates and Mamelodi Sundowns, as both chase to end lengthy title droughts. The Pirates are in line to cla...

item.title: How AI Can Assist Urban Planning While Keeping Human Judgment Central
item.description: Generative AI, especially through large language models (LLMs) like ChatGPT and DeepSeek, don dey become part of how we dey plan cities. These tools fit quickly summarise research, simulate traffic or...

item.title: Clark Gable's Career and Life in the 1950s
item.description: Clark Gable, often hailed as the 'King of Hollywood,' experienced a significant evolution in his career during the 1950s. Having appeared in over 60 films across a range of genres, Gable transitioned ...

item.title: PDP Gombe Names Candidates for Senate and House of Reps for 2027 Elections
item.description: The Gombe State chapter of the Peoples Democratic Party (PDP) don officially announce their candidates for the 2027 general elections. The party pick candidates for three Senatorial Districts and six ...

item.title: PTI leaders blocked from meeting Imran Khan, party announces nationwide protests
item.description: ISLAMABAD: PTI faces another setback as party leaders were again denied a meeting with their founder Imran Khan at Adiala jail, where he has been imprisoned since 2023. MNA Ahad Ali Shah told Dawn tha...

item.title: Post-poll violence in West Bengal sees BJP involved in majority of incidents
item.description: Following the West Bengal Assembly elections held in 2026, the state witnessed 64 incidents of post-poll violence between May 4 and May 7, according to data collected by the Armed Conflict Location & ...

item.title: NAHCON Successfully Finish 2026 Hajj Outbound Airlift, Carry Nearly 39,000 Nigerian Pilgrims
item.description: The National Hajj Commission of Nigeria (NAHCON) don successfully conclude the 2026 Hajj outbound airlift operation wey carry Nigerian pilgrims go Saudi Arabia. The operation wey start on May 3, 2026,...

item.title: Immigrants at Desert View Annex Stage Hunger Strike Over Detention Conditions
item.description: At least 20 immigrants detained at the Desert View Annex in Adelanto, California, have begun a hunger strike to protest substandard living conditions. The strike, organized by a coalition of immigrant...

item.title: US Charges Former Cuban Leader Raúl Castro Over 1996 Shootdown Incident
item.description: The United States government has formally filed murder charges against former Cuban President Raúl Castro, alongside five Cuban military pilots, related to a 1996 incident where Cuban jets shot down p...

item.title: Democratic Lawmakers Threaten Repeated Expulsion Votes Over Candidate's Antisemitic Remarks
item.description: Two Democratic lawmakers, Reps. Jared Moskowitz of Florida and Josh Gottheimer of New Jersey, have pledged to repeatedly vote to expel Texas Democratic candidate Maureen Galindo from Congress if she w...

item.title: Despite Low Confidence, American Consumers Keep Spending
item.description: American consumers continue to spend aggressively despite widespread dissatisfaction with the economy. Retailers like Walmart, Target, Home Depot, and Lowe’s reported strong earnings this week, surpri...

item.title: How African-Australian Players Are Shaping the Socceroos Ahead of the 2026 World Cup
item.description: Mo Touré and Nestory Irankunda, both of African heritage, are emerging as standout talents in the Socceroos squad ahead of the 2026 World Cup in North America. Touré, born in Guinea after his family f...

item.title: Government Increases Support for Small Businesses to Boost Jobs and Growth
item.description: Small business development minister Stella Tembisa Ndabeni has unveiled a R3 billion budget aimed at bolstering South Africa's small business sector, which is the country’s largest employer. Key initi...

item.title: PM Shehbaz honours 75 years of Pak-China diplomatic ties and acknowledges Beijing’s support
item.description: On Thursday, Prime Minister Shehbaz Sharif publicly appreciated the enduring friendship between Pakistan and China, calling it a relationship of unwavering support that stands unmatched historically. ...

item.title: Trump's Approval Rating Hits Near Record Lows in Latest Fox News Poll
item.description: A recent Fox News poll has revealed a significant drop in President Donald Trump's approval ratings, alarming both the public and media commentators. On MSNBC's 'Morning Joe,' co-host Mika Brzezinski ...

item.title: Volkswagen clarifies no current talks with Chinese firms amid European overcapacity concerns
item.description: Volkswagen CEO Oliver Blume has confirmed that the company is not currently in discussions with Chinese manufacturers, despite ongoing concerns about overcapacity at its European and German plants. Sp...

item.title: Two Schoolchildren Killed in Bajaur by Unidentified Quadcopter Strike
item.description: In a tragic incident on Thursday in Bajaur district of Khyber Pakhtunkhwa, two young schoolchildren, aged 10 and 12, lost their lives when a quadcopter drone reportedly struck a hilly area in Shahi Th...

item.title: SpaceX files IPO prospectus with ambitious goals and Starlink profits
item.description: SpaceX has filed its IPO prospectus ahead of a potential Wall Street listing valued up to US$1.75 trillion, despite reporting a US$4.9 billion loss on US$18.7 billion revenue in 2025. Investors are be...
